variant.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] text-gray-900 dark:text-white
variant.h2: text-3xl md:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight leading-tight text-gray-900 dark:text-white
variant.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900 dark:text-white
variant.detail: text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-900 dark:text-white

color.gradient: text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-sky-500 dark:from-emerald-400 dark:to-sky-400
